title: Stillness and incremental change
description: A durational piece exploring near-stillness, small gestures, and barely perceptible change over time.
context: This piece explores stillness and incremental change. Instruct the performer to make slow, near-imperceptible actions — shifts of weight, breath, gaze, tiny adjustments of posture or position. Changes should accumulate so gradually they are hard to locate in time. Avoid large gestures. If multiple performers are present, consider how their micro-actions relate spatially without direct contact or coordination.
